summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dr. Armando Cardenas medical landing page with 20 UI improvements. Successfully verified 14/15 core features with excellent visual implementation.

seo_critical_bugs.issue: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of SEO-optimized title
seo_critical_bugs.expected: Radiofrecuencia Articular en Mérida | Dr. Armando Cardenas - Rodilla, Cadera y Hombro
seo_critical_bugs.impact: Critical for SEO and user experience

seo_critical_bugs.issue: Meta description shows 'A product of emergent.sh' instead of medical content
seo_critical_bugs.expected: Dr. Armando Cardenas - Cirujano Ortopedista especializado en rodilla, cadera y hombro en Mérida, Yucatán...

seo_critical_bugs.issue: No JSON-LD schema markup detected on live page (0 scripts found)
seo_critical_bugs.expected: MedicalBusiness and Physician schema markup should be present
seo_critical_bugs.impact: Missing structured data for search engines

passed_tests: Hero section with real doctor photo and radiofrequency equipment
Trust indicators (20+ years, 2000+ procedures, Especialista en Ortopedia)
Services section with 8 teal 'Consultar por WhatsApp' buttons and specific WhatsApp links
Services cards with benefits tags (Sin hospitalización, Ambulatorio, etc)
Testimonials section with 3 patient reviews, star ratings, and procedure tags
Doctor section with full name 'Dr. Armando Cardenas'
Doctor section with Cédula Prof. 2930543 and Especialidad 6075243
Doctor section with Colegio and Consejo Mexicano certification logos
Process steps with unified teal colors throughout
Location section with embedded Google Maps iframe
Contact form with 'Solicita tu valoración' title and teal submit button
Footer with visible logo on white background
Footer showing Dr. Armando Cardenas with professional credentials
All visual elements and components loading correctly

success_percentage.seo_markup: 0% - Critical SEO metadata issues need fixing

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix SEO metadata: 1) Update page title from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to proper medical SEO title, 2) Fix meta description from generic to medical content, 3) Ensure Schema.org JSON-LD markup is properly rendered on live page. The HTML head content from index.html may not be applying correctly in production.
